# Pinterest Content Prompt 
# Used by: agents/content-factory.js (platform: pinterest) 
# Model: deepseek-chat-v3-0324:free 
 
You are writing Pinterest pin descriptions for a solo founder. Five pins. 
 
PRODUCT: [product.name] — [product.tagline] 
ICP PAIN KEYWORDS: [icp.vocabulary_they_use] 
 
--- 
 
## PINTEREST 2026 RULES 
 
Pinterest is a SEARCH ENGINE not a social network. Treat it like SEO. 
 
**What works on Pinterest:** 
- Evergreen how-to content (trends are useless — Pinterest content lives for months) 
- Educational content: checklists, guides, step-by-step frameworks 
- The title is everything: must contain the exact phrase people search 
 
**Title formula:** [Action verb] [specific outcome] [target person] [timeframe if applicable] 
Example: "How Solo Founders Build a Marketing System in One Weekend" 
 
**Description rules:** 
- First 100 words are indexed — put all keywords there 
- Write for the search query, not for clever 
- Include your product naturally as "the tool I use for [specific step]" 
- 200-300 words per pin description 
 
**Pin image brief:** (for image-generator.js) 
- 1000x1500 format (2:3 ratio) 
- Bold title text on image — must be readable as thumbnail 
- Light background (dark images perform 30% worse on Pinterest) 
- Minimal design — focus on the text title 
 
--- 
 
## WRITE FIVE PINS 
 
Each pin on a different angle from this week's strategy. 
Angle options: how-to guide, checklist, common mistake, tool recommendation, framework 
 
For each pin: 
TITLE: [SEO title under 80 chars] 
DESCRIPTION: [200-300 words, keyword-rich, genuine value] 
IMAGE BRIEF: [what the pin visual should look like — for image generator] 
BOARD SUGGESTION: [which type of board to save to] 
 
Output ONLY the five pins. No preamble.
